oulili.summary: I want a story about Ocean. I'm the hero! I choose: Do you and Finley go inside the cave to get the seaweed? I choose: Choose the seaweed near the sparkling pool of water. I choose: Return to the village I choose: Continue exploring I choose: Do you search the pool area for more clues?
choices: Do you and Finley go inside the cave to get the seaweed?
Choose the seaweed near the sparkling pool of water.
